name: Pollo a La Creme
recipeIngredient: 1 cup White sauce, made according to your favorite recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissect the chicken and season with salt and pepper.
2. Sauté in shortening until golden brown and almost done, turning occasionally.
3. Remove from bones and cut into chunks.
4. Prepare a rich white sauce according to your favorite recipe and add 2 well-beaten egg yolks.
5. Cook noodles as per package instructions.
6. Add the white sauce, salt, pepper, grated cheese, and meat extract to the noodles.
7. Pour into a buttered ring mold.
8. Heat in a 350°F oven over a pan of hot water for about half an hour or until the mold is firm.
9. Place chicken pieces in cream and heat, but do not allow the cream to boil.
10. Unmold the noodles and fill with creamy chicken in the center.
11. Garnish with watercress.
Makes 4 or 5 servings.
